'''Bobby''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiate]] studying with the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final [[Standard decade/Legends|decade]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Bobby received his [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] from the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] at their [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Temple]]. Placed into the Mighty [[Bear Clan/Legends|Bear Clan]], a [[Clan (Jedi)/Legends|clan]] of [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiates]] noted for their bravery, Bobby received direct training from the clan's minder, [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]].<ref name="SW2JuniorNovel" />

==Behind the scenes==
Bobby first appeared in the junior novelization of [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones (junior novelization)|''Star Wars Episode II: Attack of the Clones'']]. He later appeared in the non-[[canon]] TV special ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Padawan Menace]]''. He became a main character in the TV special series called [[LEGO Star Wars: The Yoda Chronicles|LEGO ''Star Wars: The Yoda Chronicles'']] for the first season as he made his last appearance in the Yoda Chronicles series season two episode one [[Escape from the Jedi Temple]].
